service: AWS Partner Central Revenue Measurement API for creating, managing, and tracking revenue attributions and their allocations with deal entities such as offers and opportunities.

operations.CreateMarketplaceRevenueShare: Creates a new marketplace revenue share resource in the specified catalog.
operations.CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation: Creates a new marketplace revenue share allocation for the specified product.
operations.CreateRevenueAttribution: Creates a new revenue attribution record in the specified catalog.
operations.GetMarketplaceRevenueShare: Retrieves the details of a specific marketplace revenue share.
operations.GetMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation: Retrieves the details of a specific marketplace revenue share allocation.
operations.GetRevenueAttribution: Retrieves the details of a specific revenue attribution.
operations.GetRevenueAttributionAllocation: Retrieves a single allocation by its RevenueAttributionAllocationId. Supports optional point-in-time version queries.
operations.GetRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask: Retrieves the current status of a previously submitted allocations task. When COMPLETE, includes the latest revision. When FAILED, includes error details.
operations.ListMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocations: Returns a paginated list of allocations under a marketplace revenue share, with optional filtering by status and effective date range. Supports historical reads at a specific share revision.
operations.ListMarketplaceRevenueShares: Returns a paginated list of marketplace revenue shares with optional filters.
operations.ListRevenueAttributionAllocations: Returns a paginated list of committed allocations with support for filtering by entity, customer, status, or date range.
operations.ListRevenueAttributions: Returns a paginated list of revenue attributions with optional filters.
operations.ListTagsForResource: Returns the tags associated with the specified resource.
operations.StartRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask: Submits a batch of up to 250 allocation changes (CREATE and/or UPDATE) for asynchronous processing. Returns a TaskId for tracking.
operations.TagResource: Adds or overwrites one or more tags for the specified resource.
operations.UntagResource: Removes one or more tags from the specified resource.
operations.UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation: Updates an existing marketplace revenue share allocation. Supports modifying effective dates, revenue share percentage, and status with time-based mutability rules.

AccessDeniedException.base: The request was denied due to insufficient permissions.

refs.AttributionSummary$TotalActiveRevenueAtt: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution whose Status is ACTIVE.
refs.AttributionSummary$TotalRevenueAttributi: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution, counting both ACTIVE and INACTIVE.
refs.GetRevenueAttributionOutput$TotalActiveR: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution whose Status is ACTIVE.
refs.GetRevenueAttributionOutput$TotalRevenue: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution, counting both ACTIVE and INACTIVE.

refs.AttributionSummary$EffectiveFrom: The date from which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the earliest allocation start date (YYYY-MM-DD).
refs.AttributionSummary$EffectiveUntil: The date until which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the latest allocation end date (YYYY-MM-DD).
refs.CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationI: The effective start date for the allocation. Must be the first day of a month.
The effective end date for the allocation. Must be the last day of a month (YYYY-MM-DD). Omit for open-ended allocations.
refs.CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationO: The effective start date of the allocation.
The effective end date of the allocation, or null if open-ended.
refs.GetMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationOutp: The effective start date of the allocation.
The effective end date of the allocation, or null if open-ended.
refs.GetRevenueAttributionOutput$EffectiveFro: The date from which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the earliest allocation start date (YYYY-MM-DD).
refs.GetRevenueAttributionOutput$EffectiveUnt: The date until which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the latest allocation end date (YYYY-MM-DD).
refs.ListMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationsIn: Inclusive lower bound for EffectiveFrom date filter.
Exclusive upper bound for EffectiveFrom date filter (half-open range).
refs.ListRevenueAttributionAllocationsInput$A: Inclusive lower bound for EffectiveFrom date filter.
refs.ListRevenueAttributionAllocationsInput$B: Exclusive upper bound for EffectiveFrom date filter (half-open range).
refs.ListRevenueAttributionAllocationsInput$A: Inclusive lower bound for EffectiveUntil date filter.
refs.ListRevenueAttributionAllocationsInput$B: Exclusive upper bound for EffectiveUntil date filter (half-open range).
refs.MarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationSummary: The effective start date of the allocation.
The effective end date of the allocation, or null if open-ended.
refs.RevenueAttributionAllocationErrorDetail$: Effective start date of the failing record.
Effective end date of the failing record.
refs.RevenueShareAllocation$EffectiveFrom: The effective start date for this allocation.
refs.RevenueShareAllocation$EffectiveUntil: The effective end date for this allocation.
refs.UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationI: The new effective start date. Must be the first day of a month. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.
The new effective end date. Must be the last day of a month and on or after today.
refs.UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationO: The effective start date of the allocation.
The effective end date of the allocation, or null if open-ended.

refs.RevenueShareAllocation$Status: Allocation status. Defaults to ACTIVE on CREATE.
refs.UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationI: The new status. Set to INACTIVE for soft-delete. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.
